textByHash.1b3736ec53ec872f3903485b93e41ebd98343641: What do you want, small t'ing?
textByHash.2260ae689218245530706affa65181478249367a: Bold words for a t'ing so small.
textByHash.24eb0be1c9808a9d97c8c8623c5446a6dfc7bd60: Then you shall get nothing from me!
textByHash.3cd7bcbb63830fd777957d92aaa377f452909e5c: The small t'ing returns; what do you want now?
textByHash.5802643819e4bd14799a86151d2d5927f19c49a9: [laugh][laugh]! Small t'ing returns. Did you bring the dragon bone?
textByHash.5c7b91b381aa661b06316c8d237a3acf677617cc: [laugh][laugh]! It t'inks it's a match for Toban, does it?
textByHash.6c11bb403f30858dfea0b7562bfb1f3e4da8d1e5: [laugh][laugh]! Small t'ing has done it. Toban is glad - take this...
textByHash.81a4a86d8ec1dc9b79794a85bc1ceba135824a31: Prove to me your might: bring me the bones of an adult dragon to chew on, and I'll eat them, not you.
textByHash.8a7d27ea86405e5f81da85519fb9371c505bb378: [laugh][laugh]! This creature t'inks it can help me! I would eat you now, but for your puny size.
textByHash.8d9e33f24ab29acaef6f84e412e0160234cb4879: Small t'ing, you lie to me! I always says that small t'ings are big trouble.
textByHash.b57f5f6a817b035a7d7d9dfceae571dc08696b99: Have you arrived for dinner? [laugh][laugh]! Be gone, small t'ing!
